query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vocab_entries) AS total_vocab,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_imports) AS total_pending,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_imports WHERE status = 'pending') AS pending_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_imports WHERE status = 'accepted') AS accepted_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pending_imports WHERE status = 'skipped') AS skipped_count;
